title: Hyperparameter Tuning Path
description: Build fluency in Hyperparameter Tuning inside Model Optimization by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Neural Architecture Search (NAS)
steps.summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after Neural Architecture Search and A* Search. It opens into Neural Architecture Search (NAS) Techniques and Cognitive Neural Architecture Search (brain-aligned NAS).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: adapter tuning
steps.summary: adapter tuning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after P-Tuning and K-Adapter. It opens into Partial Adapter Tuning and Unified Adapter Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: LoRA Fine-Tuning
steps.summary: LoRA Fine-Tuning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after P-Tuning and Fine Tuning. It opens into open-source fine-tuning frameworks (e.g., LoRA, PEFT, AdapterHub) and LoRA Fine-Tuning for Diffusion.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Prompt Tuning
steps.summary: Prompt Tuning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after P-Tuning. It opens into Prompt-Tuning-v2 and Soft Prompt Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Prefix Tuning
steps.summary: Prefix Tuning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after P-Tuning. It opens into Prefix-Tuning-Deep and Disentangled Prefix Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: partial fine-tuning
steps.summary: partial fine-tuning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after P-Tuning and Fine Tuning. It opens into Partial Fine-Tuning with GPTQ and Partial Parameter Fine-Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Hyperparameter Optimization
steps.summary: Hyperparameter Optimization belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after Optimization Algorithms. It opens into XGBoost Hyperparameter Optimization and Bayesian Hyperparameter Optimization.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Hyperparameter Tuning Methods
steps.summary: Hyperparameter Tuning Methods belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Model Optimization / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after P-Tuning. It opens into Hyperparameter tuning with validation and Cross-validation with hyperparameter tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
